sourceMovie.title: Alien Resurrection
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Alien Resurrection works as a science fiction movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The science fiction and horror blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Resident Evil
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Alien Resurrection clicked for you, Resident Evil (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Alien Resurrection clicked for you, Resident Evil: Apocalypse (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Terminator
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Alien Resurrection clicked for you, The Terminator (1984) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Alien Resurrection?
faq.answer: Try Resident Evil, Resident Evil: Apocalypse, The Terminator—each shares DNA with Alien Resurrection while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Alien Resurrection?
faq.answer: Alien Resurrection (1997) is best described as Science Fiction, Horror, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Alien Resurrection part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Alien Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
